title: MSU's Thompson blazes combine-best 4.26 in 40
content: Mississippi State's Brenen Thompson clocked a 4.26-second 40-yard dash Saturday, the third fastest by a wide receiver at the combine since 2003.

title: Staley: Working to bring home ex-players in Israel
content: South Carolina coach Dawn Staley said on social media Saturday that the school is working to try to help a few former players return home from Israel, where they are playing.

title: Alongside Hughes bros, Knight jokes back on 'SNL'
content: Hilary Knight appeared on "Saturday Night Live" along with U.S. women's hockey teammate Megan Keller and men's team brothers Jack and Quinn Hughes, and Knight quipped, "It was going to be just us, but we thought we'd invite the guys too."

title: Gators win 9th straight, clinch share of SEC title
content: No. 7 Florida earned at least a share of the Southeastern Conference title with a 111-77 romp over 20th-ranked Arkansas on Saturday night.

title: Green, top-10 QB prospect, sets combine records
content: Taylen Green, a top-10 quarterback prospect ahead of April's NFL draft, set several positional combine records during Saturday's workout in Indianapolis.

title: Buffs asst. Sapp resigns; Marve promoted to DC
content: Colorado defensive assistant Warren Sapp resigned to "pursue other opportunities," and Chris Marve was promoted to defensive coordinator, the school announced.

title: Kerr walks back comments on Porzingis' diagnosis
content: Warriors center Kristaps Porzingis will miss a fourth straight game on Saturday night due to general illness.

title: Michigan loses guard Cason (ACL) for rest of year
content: Michigan's L.J. Cason, who had emerged as one of the premier backup guards in college basketball this season, suffered a torn right ACL and will miss the rest of the season.

title: 🏈 Best NFL combine workouts and draft risers
content: Top prospects such as David Bailey and Ohio State's linebacker duo starred. Here are our experts on the combine's top workouts.

title: WWE takeaways: Only one surprising outcome at Elimination Chamber
content: The title matchups for WrestleMania 42 are nearly set following WWE Elimination Chamber, but there is only one pairing that we didn't see coming.

title: Men's Bubble Watch: SEC race takes clearer shape with Auburn, Texas A&M sliding
content: The Tigers and Aggies are in a crowded tier vying for the final spots in a potential 10- to 11-bid conference.

title: Where would Fernando Mendoza rank among QBs drafted in Round 1 over the past five years?
content: Let's rank every quarterback picked in Round 1 from 2021 to 2025 based on predraft evaluations -- and then slot in the expected No. 1 pick for 2026.

title: Did Sydney Sweeney hit Bruno Fernandes' celebration on visit to Man United star's old club?
content: Hollywood star Sydney Sweeney visited Sporting CP and appeared to imitate the trademark celebration of one of the club's former player, Bruno Fernandes.

title: Late to set-piece party, Liverpool are making up for lost time
content: Liverpool were unlucky from set pieces in the first half of the season, but that turned around on Saturday.

title: Your guide to the Unrivaled playoffs: Breeze and Vinyl advance to semifinals
content: The Phantom will face the Vinyl and the Mist play the Breeze in the semifinals on Monday in Brooklyn.

title: Bracketology: UNC inching closer but still outside of top 16
content: The Tar Heels are in third place in the ACC and have won 11 of their past 12 games, but they remain a No. 5 seed.

title: 'You're looking at a Ferrari': Introducing Konnor Griffin, MLB's next teenage superstar
content: The No. 1 prospect in baseball has a chance to join exclusive company on Opening Day -- if the Pirates are willing to let him.

title: Ten years into his UFC career, Brandon Moreno still thinks he can be a three-time champion
content: One more run at the flyweight title would cap an already historic career for Mexican MMA pioneer Brandon Moreno.

title: One free agent each NFL team should sign: We found 32 perfect fits
content: Mike Evans to the Bills? Malik Willis to the Jets? Riq Woolen to the Jaguars? We found free agent fits for all 32 teams this offseason.

title: Betting buzz: Kon Knueppel overtakes Cooper Flagg as NBA Rookie of the Year favorite
content: Kon Knueppel's hot play has shaken up the Rookie of the Year odds, as the Hornets' star passes Cooper Flagg as the favorite.

title: 'Attempting to mingle': Cameron Brink reveals how she met her fiancé via email
content: Brinks now-fiancé got in contact via unconventional means, eschewing social media direct messages and instead sending an email.

title: Champions League round of 16 predictions: Real Madrid over Man City?
content: The path to the Champions League final is now mapped out, but who do we think makes it all the way to Budapest? Mark Ogden makes his picks.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Inter could reignite interest in Liverpool's Jones
content: Manchester City and Manchester United are set for a battle to sign Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 17 Killed In Blast At Explosives Manufacturing Company Near Nagpur
content: Seventeen people were killed and 18 others injured in a devastating explosion that occurred early this morning at SBL Energy Limited - a mining and industrial explosives manufacturing company located in Raulgaon, in Katol near Nagpur, police said.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Who Gets The 'Peace Prize' Now, Mr Trump - The Drones Or The Bombers?
content: A president who returned to the White House on the promise of ending 'Forever Wars' - and wanted a Nobel Peace Prize, no less - now presides over the largest American military build-up in the region since the infamous Iraq war.

title: Inside CIA's Plan To Eliminate Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
content: The CIA zeroed in on the location of the target: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, 86, Iran's supreme leader. The US intelligence agency had been trailing Khamenei for months, identifying his locations and patterns.

title: From Pak To Iraq, Protesters Storm US Consulates Over Khamenei's Death
content: Scores of men forced their way into the United States Consulate in Pakistan's Karachi on Sunday, as tensions escalated in the Middle East after Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was announced.

title: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: UN Nuclear Agency To Hold Emergency Meeting After US-Israeli Strikes On Iran
content: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: The United Nations' nuclear agency will hold an extraordinary meeting on Iran on Monday in the wake of the US-Israeli strikes on the Islamic republic, aimed in part at Tehran's atomic programme.

title: 'US Heading Towards Collapse': What Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Said In Last Public Speech
content: As people across Iran and several other parts of the world mourn the death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a joint military operation by Israel and the United States, a clip of his last public address has gone viral

title: Why US, Israel Chose Saturday Morning For Strikes On Iran
content: A confirmation of Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's conferral with his top advisers put the Israeli-US air and naval operation against Tehran into motion, Reuters reported citing sources.

title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei Dead, What We Know About His Wife, Children
content: Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been killed following strikes by the United States and Israel on Iranian targets, according to state media.

title: US Used Anthropic's Claude AI In Iran Strikes Hours After Trump's Ban: Report
content: Claude AI was also reportedly used in the US military operation that captured Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro.

title: Smoke Plumes, Sirens As Iran Strikes Doha, Dubai After Khamenei's Death
content: Hours after Iranian media announced the death of their supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, more explosions were heard across the Gulf cities of Dubai, Doha and Manama, where sirens were activated.

title: Aziz Nasirzadeh To Mohammad Pakpour, Top Iran Leaders Killed In US-Israel Strikes
content: The Israeli army said that Ali Shamkhani, a top advisor to Khamenei, and the head of Iran's powerful Revolutionary Guards, General Mohammad Pakpour, were also killed in the strikes.

title: Video Shows Moment Iranian Anchor Broke News Of Ayatollah Khamenei's Death
content: A clip circulating on social media shows the moment an Iranian television anchor appeared visibly emotional while announcing the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei during a live broadcast.

title: Cheated Death On A Saturday, It Got Him On Another: The Ali Khamenei Story
content: At 3.07 am (IST) on March 1, US President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social, "Khamenei, one of the most evil people in history, is dead". Later, Iran's state media confirmed the death of its Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

title: Trump Visited A Burger Joint. Declared Iran Strikes 9 Hours Later
content: On a visit to Texas on Friday, US President Donald Trump gave a raucous speech on the economy and then stopped off at a fast food joint.

title: In Familiar Ritual, Israelis Race Back And Forth To Shelters Amid Missile Barrages
content: Constant missile salvos from Iran sent people in central Israel in and out of shelters throughout the day on Saturday after the U.S. and Israel launched a major attack on Iran.

title: Khamenei's Daughter, Son-In-Law, Granddaughter Killed In Israel-US Strikes
content: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's daughter, granddaughter, daughter-in-law, and son-in-law have been killed in strikes by the US and Israel, Iranian media reported on Sunday.

title: Opinion: Opinion | 'Insider' Info? Why US-Israel Couldn't Have Struck Khamenei Without Help
content: The only way actionable intelligence would reach Israel and the US on Khamenei's whereabouts, movements, and schedules, is if the calls were coming from inside the house itself.

title: "No Clue What To Do": Fliers Stuck At Indian Airports Due To Middle East Crisis
content: The flight ops were disrupted after the US and Israel attacked Iran on Saturday, killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

title: "Trump Wasn't Going To Sit Back": Inside Details On Why US Attacked Iran
content: The US and Israel carried out coordinated airstrikes across Iran yesterday after stalled nuclear talks and claims that Iran had resumed its nuclear activities.

title: 'Will Hit Iran With Force Never Seen Before': Trump's Tit-For-Tat Warning
content: Iran launched fresh attacks on US and Israel bases shortly after it vowed to avenge the killing of its Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei.

title: Watch: Mob storms US Consulate in Pakistan after Khamenei's death; 6 killed in violent clash
content: Hundreds stormed the US consulate in Karachi after a joint US-Israel airstrike killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Protesters vandalized and set parts of the building ablaze, resulting in one death and several injuries as police intervened. Iran retaliated with missile strikes on Israel and Gulf Arab states, vowing revenge.

title: Iran strikes Gulf again: More explosions in Dubai, Doha and Manama; airports targeted?
content: Iran launched retaliatory strikes across key Gulf cities, including Dubai, Doha, and Manama, targeting areas hosting US military bases. These attacks followed US and Israeli strikes that reportedly killed Iran's Supreme Leader. Major airports experienced evacuations and flight suspensions due to the escalating regional conflict.

title: Why Saturday? How Israel-US strikes targeted Khamenei and his inner circle
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei was reportedly killed in a pre-emptive US-Israel airstrike on Saturday, dubbed 'The Epic Fury'. The operation, timed to coincide with a top leadership meeting, aimed to maintain surprise. This dramatic escalation follows months of planning and increased US military presence in the region, raising concerns of retaliation.

title: Jammu and Kashmir's maiden Ranji Trophy triumph: It takes a village
content: Jammu and Kashmir’s historic Ranji Trophy triumph is a story of collective belief, long battles and delayed redemption. From Paras Dogra’s leadership to Auqib Nabi’s rise, from Abid Nabi’s unfulfilled dream to Samiullah Beigh's sweet redemption, this title reflects years of quiet toil. In the end, it was not about who claimed credit first, but about a village that won together.

title: Just hours after Trump banned Anthropic, US govt used company's tech in Iran strikes
content: US forces reportedly utilized Anthropic's AI tool, Claude, for a significant strike on Iran, just hours after President Trump ordered federal agencies to cease using the same technology due to national security concerns. This highlights the deep integration of AI in military operations, even amidst growing disputes over its ethical use in warfare and surveillance.

title: Trump threatens Iran with ‘force never seen before’; MEA issues advisory — Key points
content: Iran launched retaliatory strikes against US and Israeli targets following the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in a US-Israel operation. Key Iranian military leaders were also reported dead. The conflict has triggered widespread flight cancellations and airspace restrictions, causing significant travel disruptions across the region.

title: 'Network down, praying to Allah that he remains safe': Lucknow resident anxiously awaits news of his son's safety in Iran
content: A Lucknow resident expressed grave concern for his son's safety in Iran, who is recovering from open-heart surgery amidst network disruptions following US and Israeli military strikes. The Indian Embassy has advised all nationals to leave Iran immediately due to the worsening security situation.

title: Amid US-Israel strikes, Iran captain sets bold target: 'We want to qualify for the World Cup'
content: The Asian Football Confederation offers full support to Iran's women's football team in Australia. The team arrived before major attacks on their homeland. They are set to compete in the Women's Asian Cup, aiming to showcase Iranian women's potential. The tournament is a significant platform for the players, with World Cup qualification as a key goal.

title: New SIM-binding rule from March 1: WhatsApp, Telegram users must know these changes
content: Starting March 1, messaging apps like WhatsApp and Telegram must implement SIM-binding, requiring services to function only with the registered SIM in the primary device. This government mandate aims to curb online fraud and enhance traceability by linking active accounts to verified SIMs. Web versions will also face stricter auto-logout rules.

title: 'Delivering decisive action as directed': US releases new videos of strikes on Iran
content: US and Israel have launched coordinated strikes targeting Iran's leadership, reportedly killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and his family. Operation Epic Fury, led by Donald Trump, utilized advanced weaponry including stealth jets and Tomahawk missiles to dismantle Iran's missile capabilities. The US Central Command confirmed the extensive military operation.

title: At least 17 killed, 18 injured in powerful blast at ammunition manufacturing factory in Nagpur
content: A devastating explosion at an ammunition manufacturing company near Nagpur claimed at least 17 lives and critically injured 18 others on Sunday morning. The blast ripped through the Nonal crimping plant, where around 35 workers were present.

title: OpenAI Pentagon deal: Sam Altman defends contract’s safety guardrails
content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman defended the company's deal with the Department of War, highlighting stronger safety guardrails than those Anthropic refused. Altman stated their agreement prohibits mass domestic surveillance and autonomous weapons, aiming to foster government-AI lab collaboration.  Despite public backlash and support for Anthropic, OpenAI maintains control over its safety protocols.

title: Speeding car climbs onto ‘invisible’ divider, overturns on Bhopal’s Ginnori road — watch
content: A car dramatically flipped after hitting an unmarked road divider on Ginnori Road, Bhopal.  CCTV footage shows the vehicle airborne before overturning. Miraculously, occupants and other commuters escaped serious injury. Residents and local officials are calling for improved safety measures, including reflectors and warning signs, on the hazardous divider to avert future accidents.

title: Into the hands of fate: India's simple semifinal equation against West Indies
content: India faces West Indies in a crucial T20 World Cup match at Eden Gardens, needing a win to secure a semifinal spot. While India is favored, the West Indies' unpredictability and their own recent batting form, including Abhishek Sharma and Tilak Varma, will keep the contest tense. Jasprit Bumrah's bowling prowess is expected to be a key factor.

title: 'There was an explosion': PV Sindhu shares terrifying update from Dubai
content: Badminton star PV Sindhu is stranded in Dubai after missile-related airspace disruptions suspended flights.  Initially en route to the All England Open, she described a frightening explosion near the airport.  Thanks to airport staff and the Indian High Commission, she and her team are safe in a secure location, awaiting the situation to stabilize and hoping to reach England.

title: Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event: Release timings for all regions
content: Epic Games announced the final two Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour events for February 28 and March 1, 2026. These events offer the most generous loot distribution, featuring four Legendary POIs per match with Rare Chests. Players have a final chance to earn Candy Hearts and themed cosmetic items during these limited-time, one-hour events.

title: Matthew Tkachuk calls Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid best player in the world
content: Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk called Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid the best player in the world after their Olympic gold medal showdown at the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Games. Tkachuk reflected on a pivotal breakaway save by United States goaltender Connor Hellebuyck that preserved Team USA’s lead and shifted momentum in the championship game.

title: Toronto Maple Leafs face trade deadline pressure amid Auston Matthews scrutiny
content: As the NHL trade deadline approaches, the Toronto Maple Leafs are unsure about the direction of their roster and their captain, Auston Matthews; as rumors about NHL trades grow stronger, management needs to find a balance between being competitive in the short term and planning for the long term. This week is going to be very important for the NHL. Along with a lot of big news coming out. There are questions about player availability, locker room dynamics, and Matthews' future.

title: 4-year-old girl mauled by a pack of stray dogs in Maharashtra town, sustains 100 wounds
content: A four-year-old girl suffered severe injuries after being attacked by stray dogs in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar. The incident has sparked outrage and renewed calls for effective stray dog control measures, with residents alleging corruption in the municipal corporation's Animal Birth Control program. The child is currently in the ICU.

title: Rashmika Mandanna turns wink girl and radiates bridal glow as she arrives in palki for wedding
content: New photos from Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda's Udaipur wedding on February 26, 2026 reveal a regal celebration. The bride made a traditional palki entrance, as decor blended a 'Periodic Era' concept with deep Indian heritage. The couple observed Telugu Hindu and Kodava rites in two ceremonies, ahead of a March 4 Hyderabad reception. Read on to know more in detail.

title: ‘444 flights expected to be cancelled on Mar 1’: Aviation ministry shares update amid crisis
content: Over 410 domestic flights were cancelled on Saturday and 444 are expected on Sunday due to ongoing airspace restrictions over Iran and the Middle East. The Ministry of Civil Aviation is closely monitoring the situation, coordinating with airlines and airports to minimize passenger inconvenience and ensure safety.

title: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Bahrain, Kuwait: Gulf countries targeted by Iran after US-Israel strikes
content: Iran launched retaliatory attacks on US assets across the Gulf, targeting Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, and the UAE, following a joint US-Israel strike. The Revolutionary Guard threatened further "intense offensive operations" against Israel and US bases. The UAE reported one fatality and injuries, while Bahrain and Kuwait intercepted missiles, with Kuwait also experiencing a drone attack on its airport.

title: Reza Pahlavi unveils democratic transition plan after Khamenei’s death
content: Iran's exiled crown prince, Reza Pahlavi, hailed Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's death following US-Israeli strikes, calling it the Islamic Republic's end. He praised President Trump and outlined a roadmap for a democratic transition, emphasizing unity among opposition groups and regional peace, including recognition of Israel. Pahlavi urged Iranians to prepare for widespread street presence.

title: US-Israel strikes on Iran: How will India be hit by Strait of Hormuz closure? Explained
content: The Strait of Hormuz has Iran on the northern side and the UAE and Oman on the southern side. It extends for around 100 miles, and its narrowest stretch is 21 miles wide. It has shallow depth, which means that ships passing through it are vulnerable to naval mines.

title: Suicide drones, Tomahawks & more: The weapons that powered US-Israel strikes on Iran
content: Operation Epic Fury saw US forces launch a massive aerial assault on Iran, reportedly killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The operation utilized Tomahawk missiles, F/A-18 and F-35 stealth fighters, and new one-way attack drones.  These precision strikes targeted key Iranian military projects, marking a significant escalation in regional tensions.

title: T20 World Cup 2026 upcoming matches: Full schedule, semifinal dates, venues
content: The ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 is nearing its conclusion, with England, South Africa, and New Zealand securing semifinal spots. The final berth will be decided between India and the West Indies in a crucial Super 8 clash. Semifinals are scheduled for March 4 and 5, with the final on March 8.

title: 'Gambled frequently, in debt': Man who killed wife, 3 kids held; police verify loan claim
content: A vegetable vendor, Munchun Kewat, has been apprehended in Rajasthan for allegedly murdering his wife and three daughters in Delhi's Samaypur Badli.  Initial reports suggest Kewat cited overwhelming debt and threats from a loan shark as motives.  Family members revealed he had borrowed heavily and gambled, leading to financial strain and arguments with his wife.

title: T20 World Cup: How an Indian throwdown specialist is boosting West Indies' power-hitters
content: Mumbai's side-arm throwdown specialist Abhishek Jain received a surprise call to bowl for the West Indies team during their practice session. Impressing coach Darren Sammy with his pace and accuracy, Jain was asked to be called daily for upcoming sessions. He also shared his gratitude towards KL Rahul for past support.

title: T20 World Cup: Why the spotlight is on Varun Chakravarthy
content: The tournament could well be divided into two contrasting halves for the mystery spinner: he enjoyed significant control and success in the group stages but Super 8 opponents South Africa and Zimbabwe handled him comfortably.

title: After Khamenei, who? How Iran chooses its Supreme Leader and who could be next
content: US President Donald Trump announced the death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei following joint US-Israeli air strikes. Khamenei's demise plunges Iran into uncertainty, with President Pezeshkian and two other officials leading a transitional period. The article explores the succession process and potential successors, including Khamenei's son and grandson, alongside opposition figures advocating for democratic change.

title: IND vs WI: India won't 'mask pressure' even as Darren Sammy rallies a war cry
content: India head into a virtual quarter-final against West Indies at Eden Gardens determined to embrace, not mask, pressure. While Darren Sammy has issued a war cry, India’s management insists on reframing pressure as privilege. With South Africa unbeaten and a semi-final spot at stake, Sunday’s clash promises a high-stakes contest between two T20 heavyweights ready to fight fire with fire.

title: ‘In the name of Haidar’: Last Message posted on Khamenei’s X after Trump declares him dead
content: Following Donald Trump's announcement of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death in a US-Israel strike, Iran's Supreme Leader's social media posted a cryptic message invoking Haidar. Iran has not confirmed the death but vowed retaliation, launching missiles and drones at Israel and US bases. Khamenei, ruling since 1989, leaves no confirmed successor, raising concerns about political stability.

title: Delhi excise case: HC to hear CBI plea against Kejriwal, Sisodia's discharge on March 9
content: The CBI has appealed the Delhi High Court against a trial court's decision to discharge all 23 accused, including Arvind Kejriwal and Manish Sisodia, in the Delhi excise policy case. The trial court found no prima facie case of conspiracy or criminal intent, criticizing the prosecution's reliance on conjecture. The High Court will hear the CBI's challenge on March 9.

title: Batting order not fixed, says India coach ahead of must-win West Indies clash
content: Tilak had a modest run in the first five matches of the tournament while batting at one down, managing a strike-rate of 120. The team management then pushed him to No. 6 against Zimbabwe.

title: Watch: Drone debris hits Dubai’s Burj Al Arab after Iranian strike
content: Dubai's iconic Burj Al Arab faced a minor fire after debris from an intercepted drone struck its facade. Authorities confirmed the incident, with Civil Defence swiftly controlling the blaze. This follows reports of an Iranian drone strike and damage at Dubai International Airport, prompting residents to seek shelter due to potential missile threats.

title: UAE shuts classrooms: All schools & universities go online amid security concerns
content: Amidst escalating regional tensions involving Iran, the US and Israel, the UAE has temporarily moved all schools and universities to online learning from March 2-4, 2026. This precautionary measure aims to ensure student and staff safety while maintaining educational continuity, leveraging digital infrastructure built during the pandemic. Other Gulf nations are also adopting similar strategies.

title: Khamenei killed in US strike: Who are his potential successors?
content: US President Donald Trump announced Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei's death following joint US-Israeli strikes, calling it a chance for Iranians to reclaim their nation.  Israeli officials confirmed the death, with Iranian state media reporting explosions and disruptions in Tehran.  The succession process, tightly controlled by the regime, now faces scrutiny amid regional tensions.

title: All you need to know about ‘Cobra’ actor Vikram's home in Chennai
content: Chiyaan Vikram, the acclaimed Tamil actor, embraces a simple, eco-conscious life at his Chennai home in Mahalingapuram. The residence features a minimalist design and natural materials—teakwood and marble—framed by garden pockets and inner courtyards that cultivate serenity and sustainability. His deep commitment to his craft complements a grounded personal life.

title: Bengaluru school owner held for 'raping' Class 8 student; principal among 3 arrested
content: A couple running a Devanahalli residential school and its principal were arrested under the Pocso Act following a class 8 student's sexual assault allegations. The 14-year-old survivor accused the owner of rape and claimed his wife and the principal failed to intervene, dismissing her concerns as common. Police are investigating further incidents.

title: President Murmu, PM Modi, Governor, leaders greet CM Stalin on his birthday
content: CM Stalin paid floral tributes at the memorials of late DMK leaders C.N. Annadurai and M. Karunanidhi, as well as social reformer ‘Periyar’ E.V. Ramasamy

title: PUC student killed in elephant attack in Kodagu
content: Her village Bettathuru is on the fringes of the forest and Pooja’s house was barely 100 metres from the forest area

title: Woman killed in lorry collision on NH 65 near Ramoji Film City
content: The deceased has been identified as Gandikota Lalitha, 41, a labourer from Waddera Basthi, Manikeshwar Nagar, Tarnaka

title: “Youngsters will continue to have job opportunities in software, telecom, service sectors in spite of challenges from AI”
content: Students need to enhance their technical skills and do certificate courses to have multiple job opportunities after completion of engineering, Lendi Institute of Engineering and Technology principal said

title: Bar and Bench cannot be separated in justice delivery system: CJI Surya Kant
content: Justice Kant said that the quality of assistance which the bar provides is reflected in the overall work of the judge

title: Lalu calls RJD Parliamentary board meeting on March 1 amid Tejashwi's RS poll contest speculations
content: The meeting is scheduled to be held four days before the last date for filing nominations in the Rajya Sabha polls

title: CM Fadnavis orders inquiry into Nagpur explosives factory blast
content: At least 17 persons were killed and 18 others injured in the blast at the detonator packing unit of SBL Energy Limited factory, a mining and industrial explosives manufacturer, at Raulgaon in Katol tehsil

title: 21 illegal migrants from Bangladesh sent back from Assam
content: "Alert eyes. Midnight action. At 12:30 a.m. Sharp, 21 illegal migrants were sent back to their respective countries, thanks to the ever-watchful @sribhumipolice," says Himanta Biswa Sarma

title: 51 houses handed over to Wayanad landslide survivors
content: Addressing the gathering, IUML State president Thangal said the unity of people to resolve the distress of people who were hit by the landslide was laudable.

title: Deputy CM Udhayanidhi inaugurates new hospital building in Chepauk
content: The building has been constructed at a cost of ₹32.32 crore, with a total built-up area of 66,658 square feet, consisting of a ground floor and two upper floors. The building is equipped with 100 beds

title: West Asia crisis: India assures visa relief to stranded foreign travellers
content: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) issued an advisory for foreign nationals impacted by the travel disruptions

title: Air India cancels 50 international flights amid West Asia crisis
content: Aviation regulator DGCA is closely coordinating with airlines to ensure full compliance with safety and operational regulations

title: Andhra Pradesh government aims to offer fair price to farmers: Minister
content: Civil Supplies Minister Nadendla Manohar warned that no negligence will be tolerated in the paddy procurement process in Kharif Marketing Season

title: NSUI holds fort in Patna University Students’ Union poll
content: The BJP’s students wing Akhil Bhartiya Vidyarthi Parishad (ABVP) bagged the posts of joint secretary and Treasurer

title: West Asia conflict: 84 MBA students from Pune stuck in Dubai
content: The students of the Indira School of Business Studies (ISBS) had gone to Dubai as part of an annual five-day study tour

title: Man arrested in Rajasthan for killing wife, three daughters in Delhi
content: The victims were found dead with their throats slit at their residence in the Samaypur Badli area and their bodies were discovered inside a ground-floor room by neighbours, who alerted the police

title: Three militants arrested in Manipur
content: Police said "security forces are conducting search operations and area domination in the fringe and vulnerable areas across districts"

title: Iran-Israel conflict: 37 flights cancelled at Bengaluru’s Kempegowda International Airport
content: The key sectors to which flight service were affected include: Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Dubai and Doha

title: In Bihar, two industrial projects worth ₹1,700 crore started
content: Deputy Chief Minister Samrat Choudhary said that the new industrial policy will accelerate investment, infrastructure development, and the goal of creating 10 million jobs

title: Thirupparankundram Deepam issue: Advocate General desists from granting consent to initiate criminal contempt against retired judge Hariparanthaman
content: The A-G’s consent had been sought pursuant to two interviews given by the retired judge against Justice G.R. Swaminathan of the Madras High Court

title: NGT issues notices to Centre, M.P. govt over clearances to Adani Group’s coal block in Singrauli
content: The notices were issued based on two petitions; one challenges the approval given by the Centre and the State for the felling of trees for the project, the other claims that a proposed elephant corridor passes through the the Dhirauli coal block area

title: T-20 rolling trophy: Madras High Court CJ’s XI lose to AG’s XI for the eighth time
content: However, Justice N. Anand Venkatesh gets adjudged man of the match for scoring 31 runs out of 40 balls besides claiming one wicket for his team

title: 17 killed, 18 injured in blast at explosives factory in Nagpur
content: Maharashtra government announced financial assistance of ₹5 lakh to the kin of those who died in the explosion

title: BLO ends life in Uttar Pradesh after leave denied for daughter's wedding
content: Police said a note left behind by the deceased, recovered from the spot, indicated that he was under severe stress due to ongoing BLO duties linked to the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) exercise

title: Kerala’s social miracle: the long journey of breaking chains, building rights
content: Kerala’s widely admired levels of literacy, public health, and civic engagement are the outcomes of a prolonged and often contentious process of social transformation.

title: Opposition raises SIR concerns in Gujarat Assembly debate; Speaker allows limited discussion on exercise
content: While Speaker Shankar Chaudhary had already allowed two Congress MLAs and one AAP legislator to speak on the Bill, Gujarat Forest and Environment Minister Arjun Modhwadia raised a point of order contending that matters pertaining to Election Commission of India (EC) cannot be discussed in the State Assembly

title: India braces for hotter-than-normal summer, more heatwave days expected
content: In March, ‌the first month of the summer season, minimum temperatures are ‌likely to remain above ‌average ⁠across most areas, said Mrutyunjay ⁠Mohapatra, director-general of the India Meteorological Department (IMD)

title: PV Sindhu, coach stranded in Dubai; left shaken by explosion near airport
content: In a post on social media, Sindhu said the ordeal was becoming “more frightening by the hour” and revealed that an explosion had taken place near the area where they were holed up.

title: Karnataka government skirts internal reservation in recruitments
content: The Government Order has asked authorities/ department to initiate recruitment notifications over the next 30 days to fill 56,432 posts with no mention of internal reservation

title: Diverse culture of States, countries portrayed at VIT’s Riviera 2026
content: At Akiya, which was started in 2015, the art and culture of 24 States was displayed with over 800 students taking part in it

title: Tiruvannamalai RTO gets Automated Driving Test Track for two-wheelers, cars
content: The new testing track is equipped with advanced sensors and CCTV cameras to ensure transparent and error-free evaluation

title: When art wilts under the sun
content: The impacts of climate change are not for the future, they are here, now, and will only inconvenience humans more over time. Geetha Srimathi looks at how the trade and health of folk artistes of Tamil Nadu have already been deeply impacted by the growing summer heat

title: For a house built in Kerala, another brought down in Bihar
content: A caste conflict in Bihar was triggered by a wage dispute over a work that was done over 2,500 kilometres away in Kerala. Amit Bhelari reports on the allegations made by both sides, which resulted in two FIRs being filed, one invoking the SC/ST Act. The brahmins had allegedly forcibly entered the home of the Scheduled Caste man who asked for money due to him. In the background, play out themes of movement and migration

title: ‘Constitutional morality finally comes down to justice without fear or favour’, Kapil Sibal at Justice Unplugged 2026
content: There is complete breakdown of constitutional machinery, says senior advocate Kapil Sibal in conversation with N. Ram, Director of The Hindu Group, at The Hindu Justice Unplugged 2026; justice needs to rise above fractious debates to interpret Constitution for the greater good, he says

title: ‘Constitutional thinking has to start from home’, says S. Muralidhar at Justice Unplugged 2026
content: Indians do not allow constitutional provisions to influence personal behaviour, says former Orissa HC Chief Justice at The Hindu Justice Unplugged 2026; change comes from social milieu, he adds

title: Why is the NEP undergrad course in chaos? | Explained
content: What are the challenges? Why are both students and teachers struggling with the fourth year schedule? Is there extra funding from UGC for the fourth year programme? What about infrastructure? Why are there frequent changes in guidelines? What lies ahead?

title: Where does the India-U.S. trade deal stand? | Explained
content: After the U.S. Supreme Court struck down the tariffs imposed by Donald Trump on countries across the world, how did the American President react? Will reciprocal tariffs be removed? Why does a 50% tariff on aluminium and steel imports continue?

title: Assam villagers resist excavation for flood mitigation project
content: Police serve notice to Raijor Dal leader Debanga Sourav Gogoi, an IIM alumnus, for allegedly instigating farmers around a network of wetlands in Jorhat district

title: ‘Justice Unplugged 2026’: extending learning beyond the classroom
content: Here’s a collection of storis from what experts and practitioners in the legal field discussed at ‘Justice Unplugged 2026’

title: Dilution of RTI Act undermining Constitutional guarantees, say legal experts
content: With greater access to court proceedings and the live-streaming of hearings, both the Bench and the Bar must exercise restraint in avoiding sensational remarks that could compromise the integrity of proceedings, experts say at ‘Justice Unplugged: Shaping the Future of Law’ conclave

title: Drive launched to make Bidar addiction-free district
content: Samiti stresses the need for collective action to eliminate social evils and to protect youth from addiction

title: PM to inaugurate projects worth over ₹4,000 crore in Madurai
content: Sources said Mr. Modi will meet party leaders at the Lok Bhavan in Chennai. On Sunday, Mr. Modi will travel to Puducherry before proceeding to Madurai.

title: Accessibility in courts remains a challenge, says lawyer
content: After Sarah Sunny’s case, things have not progressed and the process of getting an interpreter in courts is very tedious, says Sanchita Ain

title: Kalaburagi to host landmark ITF W35 women’s tennis tournament
content: The tournament will feature a 32-player singles main draw, preceded by a 32-player qualifying draw, along with a 16-team doubles draw

title: ‘First duty is to fight the system’: Advocates, judges tell law students to put Constitution first
content: Kapil Sibal speaks about courage and commitment to the profession, Abhishek Manu Singhvi comments on the NCERT textbook row, and Justice S. Muralidhar vouches for sustained self-education

title: Congress and DMK talks ‘smooth’, likely to reach an understanding soon
content: TNCC president says Congress-DMK alliance is almost sealed and they will agree upon a reasonable number of seats; he rejects speculations of a split, adds that the DMK has agreed to allot an RS seat

title: AI can be an efficient tool in the legal profession but needs rigorous monitoring, say legal experts
content: Though AI can be an efficient intern, due diligence is key to avoid fictitious case citations, says senior advocate; helpful tool to summarise voluminous records, streamline case management, reduce pendency in courts

title: RTI: ₹50,000 penalty imposed on four gram panchayat officials for delay in providing information
content: State Information Commissioner B. Venkata Singh has passed the order after hearing second appeals filed by an applicant who had not received the requested information in time

title: ‘Making justice accessible requires a systemic approach beyond formal equality‘
content: Justice is not just about dispute resolution. It is about creating a structure where every person can participate in all aspects of life with dignity, says Supreme Court lawyer Sanchita Ain

title: Slew of festivals to celebrate tribal arts, music, culture and commerce in March
content: Bharat Tribes Fest at Sundar Nursery from March 18 to 30 to showcase tribal products, including an international pavilion; Living Roots Music Festival to feature performances at Kartavya Path from March 13 to 15

title: Chhattisgarh police recovered arms, ₹46 lakh cash in a Maoist dump
content: Among the weapons purportedly recovered were a muzzle loading gun, BGL shells, INSAS rounds and non-electronic detonators, officials said.

title: Lawyer’s vigilance is society’s early warning against democratic erosion, says A.M. Singhvi
content: Mr. Singhvi drew attention to what he described as a global phenomenon of constitutional backsliding, marked by deepening polarisation and the erosion of institutional norms during law conclave

title: Opposition demands Centre to condemn attacks on Iran, protect lives of Indians in West Asia
content: Congress general secretary Jairam Ramesh said for weeks, U.S. President Donald Trump maintained the charade of diplomacy and negotiations with Iran

title: Helpline to be set up for people of Karnataka stuck in West Asian countries: CM
content: The Chief Minister says he had already instructed the Resident Commissioner in Delhi to make all necessary arrangements for their safety

title: Gehlot seeks restoration of Congress regime’s welfare schemes in Rajasthan
content: In letter to PM ahead of his Ajmer visit, former CM reminds Mr. Modi of his poll promise that the BJP would not shut down any Congress scheme if it came to power

title: Former ISRO chief urges students to harness emerging technologies to become future leaders
content: By embracing science and innovation, students can help the nation achieve the vision of Viksit Bharat by 2047, says A.S. Kiran Kumar

title: Canada-India negotiating economic partnership agreement to double two-way trade by 2030: PM Carney
content: “This is an enormous opportunity for both our countries.. but it is one that is about to move to the next level. We should aim much higher, and we are aiming much higher, and to be more strategic in our partnership,” Mr. Carney said

title: Nepali parties promise big ahead of polls; however, concerns remain
content: Parties have already unveiled their manifestos and are now on campaign trails, pledging not only development but also an end to corruption and good governance

title: Kapil Sibal calls for purposive interpretation of Constitution at law conclave
content: Says Constitutional morality ultimately is justice without fear or favour, true justice lies in the ability to rise above factional debates and interpret the Constitution in a manner that serves the larger community

title: PM Modi inaugurates Micron ATMP plant in Gujarat’s Sanand
content: The facility is the highest rupee beneficiary of funds from the India Semiconductor Mission, with a 50% capital subsidy from the Union government, and a further 20% from the Gujarat government

title: Action to be taken against building lacking mandatory parking space
content: The Hubballi Dharwad Municipal Corporation will soon start taking action to restore the mandatory parking space in commercial buildings and complexes and a Hubballi Dharwad Mayor Jyoti Patil issued ruling in this regard during the monthly council meeting in Dharwad on Friday

title: Kejriwal to address public rally at Jantar Mantar
content: The former Delhi Chief Minister will ‘present his views and outline the direction in which he will steer the party’, the AAP’s Delhi president Saurabh Bharadwaj says

title: Bihar police roll out comprehensive security plan ahead of Holi
content: Additional forces deployed across sensitive areas, religious sites and Naxal-affected districts; strict action warned against hooliganism, biker gangs and communal troublemakers

title: SLBC tunnel work resumes from outlet (Devarakonda) side
content: Minister for Irrigation Uttam Kumar Reddy says 20 metres excavated in a week in the rapid progress method

title: Matt Holliday's Stillwater estate listed for $12 million
content: a Stillwater, Oklahoma, home that once belonged to an MLB champion and seven-time All-Star is on the market at $12 million . the home features sports-related amenities such as a professionally lit baseball field in the front yard, a putting green in the backyard, and a $2 million, two-level swimming pool . indoor batting cages, pickleball and basketball courts reside in a detached $150,000 guest home on the property .

title: Who was Ayatollah Ali Khamenei? Iran's Supreme Leader killed in US-Israel strike

title: NFL Players Association releases 2026 team report cards
content: ESPN obtained the results of the NFL Players Association's 2026 report cards . it grades franchises from A-plus to F-minus on everything from ownership to treatment of families . all players who were on a 2025 roster at the time of the survey were eligible to participate .

title: Bracketology: Florida rejoins the 2-seed line
content: Content extraction failed.

title: Does anyone beat Ohtani? Buster Olney ranks the top 10 designated hitters
content: coach Buster Olney ranked the best of the best at designated hitters . the goal of this exercise is to identify the best players for the 2026 season, not who might be best in five years or over their career . we rolled out a position per day over two weeks .

title: How the top QB signings will fit in 2026
content: the top 2026 recruits at each position could fit at their new schools . the perfect harmony between skill and scheme can lead to production and wins on the field . this is the most high-profile prospect Houston has signed in the modern era .
